ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "seed" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network scenario or seed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the network source or node */,
  "PDR" INTEGER /* Packet Delivery Ratio (true if successful, false otherwise) */,
  "geocast_packets" INTEGER /* Number of geocast packets transmitted */,
  "flooding_packets" INTEGER /* Number of flooding packets transmitted */,
  "mr_nodes" INTEGER /* Number of mobile router (MR) nodes involved */,
  "mr_recvs" INTEGER /* Number of successful receptions by mobile routers */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were collected */,
  "latency" REAL /* Delay in packet transmission (in milliseconds) */,
  "bandwidth_usage" REAL /* Amount of bandwidth used (in Mbps) */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Percentage of packets lost during transmission */,
  "mr_node_status" TEXT /* Status of the mobile router nodes at the time of metric collection */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source node (e.g., router, sensor) */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the destination node */,
  "destination_type" TEXT /* Type of the destination node */,
  "protocol_used" TEXT /* Routing protocol used for the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seed", "source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_mr_nodes FOREIGN KEY ("mr_nodes") REFERENCES mr_nodes ("mr_node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the network source or node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., router, sensor) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the network source */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the network source */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the node (e.g., operational, maintenance, down) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mr_nodes" (
  "mr_node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile router node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the mobile router node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the node was deployed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the mobile router node */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the mobile router node */,
  "last_ping_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last ping */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known geographical location of the mobile router */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the mobile router (in percentage) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mr_node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, administrator) */,
  "last_login_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of specific permissions the user has */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
